testcase.name: test_pricing_full_update

failure.message: AssertionError: Internal Server Error assert 500 == 200 + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code

testcase.failure: tests/test_admin_pricing.py:63: in test_pricing_full_update assert r.status_code == 200, r.text E AssertionError: Internal Server Error E assert 500 == 200 E + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_pricing_partial_update_leaves_others

failure.message: requests.exceptions.HTTPError: 500 Server Error: Internal Server Error for url: https://fresh-feast-app-1.preview.emergentagent.com/api/admin/wallet/pricing

testcase.failure: tests/test_admin_pricing.py:78: in test_pricing_partial_update_leaves_others timeout=10).raise_for_status() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/requests/models.py:1167: in raise_for_status raise HTTPError(http_error_msg, response=self) E requests.exceptions.HTTPError: 500 Server Error: Internal Server Error for url: https://fresh-feast-app-1.preview.emergentagent.com/api/admin/wallet/pricing

failure.message: AssertionError: Internal Server Error assert 500 == 400 + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_onboarding_with_initial_topup_creates_welcome_credit
testcase.failure: tests/test_iteration3_wallet_pricing.py:213: in test_onboarding_with_initial_topup_creates_welcome_credit assert w["balance"] == 3000.0, f"expected balance 3000, got {w['balance']}" E AssertionError: expected balance 3000, got 6000.0 E assert 6000.0 == 3000.0
